testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setUp
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: The instrumentation process cannot be initialized within 30000ms timeout. testcase.name: verifyAppLaunchAndHomeOptions
